mapper.select: select count(1) from alert where status = 0

select id, type, level, status, description, ip_address as ipAddress, port, details, handler, handle_time as handleTime, handle_remark as handleRemark, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from alert order by create_time desc limit #{limit}
select type, count(1) as count from alert group by type order by count desc
select level, count(1) as count from alert group by level order by level desc
select count(1) from alert where date(create_time) = curdate()
select date(create_time) as date, count(1) as count from alert where create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval #{days} - 1 day) group by date(create_time) order by date(create_time)
